generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors and type mismatches.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Ensure AGREE expressions use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
Repairs should not introduce new AADL architecture.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Helper declarations should align with the expression's expected type.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to add architecture to resolve AGREE errors.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
